workstreams.write_owner: ChatGPT conversation: Azure IaC MSP Lab reality synchronization
workstreams.scope: Design-only collector recovery evidence contract, five closed JSON schemas, standard-library fail-closed validator, negative regression tests, design documentation, and project coordination state. Permitted paths: infra/recovery-evidence/**, infra/tests/test_collector_recovery_evidence_design.py, docs/designs/collector-recovery-evidence-schema.md, .project/active-work.json, and .project/handoffs/current-state.md. Protected paths: .github/workflows/**, infra/modules/**, existing replacement execution contract and candidate workflow, application source, credentials, Azure mutation scripts, budgets, alerts, and live resources.
workstreams.next_gate: Open a draft pull request, run exact-head CI, inspect every job, and obtain an evidence-quality review of the exact passing head. Keep Azure authentication, workflow activation, and mutations prohibited.

resolved_repository_items.durable_value: Historical Terraform static-validation, evidence vocabulary, cost-control, and verification-discipline prototype retained in Git history.
resolved_repository_items.claim_boundary: The branch was never authenticated-planned, deployed, behaviorally verified, or teardown-tested and is not part of current main.

latest_promoted_evidence.freshness_boundary: This remains the latest promoted Azure control-plane evidence. It does not prove current guest health, pricing, SKU availability, quota, actual cost, present-day deployment state, snapshot recoverability, or rollback.

verified_gates: complete ServiceTracer unit and operational smoke-test path
collector replacement contract validation and negative regression tests

ci_verification.claim_boundary: Repository tests and CI prove schema and code consistency only. They do not prove current guest health, Azure preflight, snapshot recoverability, Trusted Launch bootability, rollback, cost, quota, RBAC restoration, or execution authority.

evidence_quality.claim_boundary: A future review disposition covers repository evidence design only and cannot authorize Azure execution.

azure_cost.claim_boundary: This design increment has no Azure runtime cost; existing planning estimates are not current subscription-specific quotations or execution authorization.
